privileged_info_summary: The task optimize_product_seo@1 targets two products in a WooCommerce test store. Product 1 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt' (SKU: OCT-BLK-M) should have slug changed to 'organic-fair-trade-tee' and short description updated to include 'Sustainably sourced', 'Fair Trade Certified', and 'organic cotton'. Product 2 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' (SKU: WBH-001) should have slug changed to 'premium-anc-headphones' and short description updated to include 'active noise cancellation', '30-hour battery', and 'plush ear cushions'. Both products are created via WooCommerce setup scripts with synthetic data (WP-CLI product creation, not from external sources). All metadata values are consistent with the task description and reference real products created in the test environment.
